{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Leah's eyes
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]]'s right eye is bright blue and her left eye is a blazing crimson stone.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
